 <header class="relative min-h-screen flex items-center px-8 lg:px-20 pt-24 overflow-hidden">
 <div class="absolute inset-0 z-0">
 <img src="data:image/avif;base64," class="w-full h-full object-cover" alt="Airplane wing above clouds">
 <div class="absolute inset-0" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(248,246,241,.92) 0%,rgba(248,246,241,.6) 45%,transparent 100%)"></div>
 </div>
 <div class="relative z-10 max-w-3xl">
 <div class="gold-line mb-8"></div>
 <h1 class="serif text-6xl md:text-8xl leading-[0.95] mb-8 hero-title" style=color:var(--navy)>
 每一次起飞，<br><span class=italic style=color:var(--gold)>都是一次</span><br>全新的抵达
 </h1>
 <p class="text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed max-w-md mb-10" style=color:var(--navy-light)>
 自2008年诞生于杭州，星空航空现已通达82座国内城市与47个国际航点，每日执飞超过600个航班，连接世界的每一个角落。
 </p>
 <div class="flex gap-6 items-center">
 <button class="btn-primary hover-trigger"><span>探索航线</span></button>
 <a href=# class="text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase hover-trigger flex items-center gap-2" style=color:var(--navy)>
 <span>了解更多</span>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=arrow-right aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-arrow-right w-4 h-4"><path d="M5 12h14"></path><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"></path></svg>
 </a>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="absolute right-8 lg:right-20 bottom-32 hidden lg:block z-10 floating">
 <div class="p-8 backdrop-blur-md border" style=background:rgba(255,255,255,.55);border-color:rgba(201,162,39,.3)>
 <p class="serif text-4xl italic mb-2" style=color:var(--gold)>600+</p>
 <p class="text-xs tracking-[0.15em] uppercase" style=color:var(--navy-light)>每日航班</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 </header>
 
 <section class="py-32 px-8 lg:px-20" style=background:var(--cream)>
 <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
 <div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-end justify-between mb-20 gap-6">
 <h2 class="serif text-5xl md:text-6xl reveal visible">核心价值</h2>
 <p class="text-sm max-w-sm leading-relaxed reveal visible" style=color:var(--navy-light)>安全为基石，航线为血脉，体验为灵魂，美食为记忆，数字化为未来。</p>
 </div>
 <div class="grid md:grid-cols-5 gap-8">
 <div class="reveal card-hover p-8 border-t visible" style=border-color:var(--gold)>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=shield-check aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-shield-check w-8 h-8 mb-6" style=color:var(--gold)><path d="M20 13c0 5-3.5 7.5-7.66 8.95a1 1 0 0 1-.67-.01C7.5 20.5 4 18 4 13V6a1 1 0 0 1 1-1c2 0 4.5-1.2 6.24-2.72a1.17 1.17 0 0 1 1.52 0C14.51 3.81 17 5 19 5a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"></path><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg>
 <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase mb-3">安全至上</h3>
 <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed" style=color:var(--navy-light)>零妥协的安全标准，行业领先的维护体系。</p>
 </div>
 <div class="reveal card-hover p-8 border-t md:mt-12 visible" style=border-color:var(--gold)>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=globe-2 aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-globe-2 w-8 h-8 mb-6" style=color:var(--gold)><path d="M21.54 15H17a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v4.54"></path><path d="M7 3.34V5a3 3 0 0 0 3 3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2c0 1.1.9 2 2 2a2 2 0 0 0 2-2c0-1.1.9-2 2-2h3.17"></path><path d="M11 21.95V18a2 2 0 0 0-2-2a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-1a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H2.05"></path><circle cx=12 cy=12 r=10></circle></svg>
 <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase mb-3">通达全球</h3>
 <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed" style=color:var(--navy-light)>129个目的地，无缝衔接您的每一段旅程。</p>
 </div>
 <div class="reveal card-hover p-8 border-t md:mt-24 visible" style=border-color:var(--gold)>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=sofa aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-sofa w-8 h-8 mb-6" style=color:var(--gold)><path d="M20 9V6a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3"></path><path d="M2 16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h16a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-5a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v1.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5.5h-11a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5V11a2 2 0 0 0-4 0z"></path><path d="M4 18v2"></path><path d="M20 18v2"></path><path d="M12 4v9"></path></svg>
 <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase mb-3">客舱体验</h3>
 <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed" style=color:var(--navy-light)>宽敞座椅、静谧空间、贴心服务。</p>
 </div>
 <div class="reveal card-hover p-8 border-t md:mt-12 visible" style=border-color:var(--gold)>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=utensils aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-utensils w-8 h-8 mb-6" style=color:var(--gold)><path d="M3 2v7c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h4a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V2"></path><path d="M7 2v20"></path><path d="M21 15V2a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v6c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h3Zm0 0v7"></path></svg>
 <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase mb-3">高空美馔</h3>
 <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed" style=color:var(--navy-light)>米其林团队打造，万米高空也能享受味蕾盛宴。</p>
 </div>
 <div class="reveal card-hover p-8 border-t visible" style=border-color:var(--gold)>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=smartphone aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-smartphone w-8 h-8 mb-6" style=color:var(--gold)><rect width=14 height=20 x=5 y=2 rx=2 ry=2></rect><path d="M12 18h.01"></path></svg>
 <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase mb-3">数字服务</h3>
 <p class="text-xs leading-relaxed" style=color:var(--navy-light)>一键值机、实时追踪、智能推荐。</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </section>
 
 <section class="py-32 diagonal-bg" style=background:var(--navy);color:var(--cream)>
 <div class="px-8 lg:px-20 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
 <div class="flex items-center gap-6 mb-16 reveal visible">
 <div class=gold-line></div>
 <h2 class="serif text-5xl md:text-6xl">精选航线优惠</h2>
 </div>
 <div class="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-10">
 <div class="reveal group cursor-pointer hover-trigger visible">
 <div class="overflow-hidden mb-6">
 <img src="data:image/avif;base64," class="w-full h-80 object-cover destination-img" alt="Sanya beach">
 </div>
 <div class="flex justify-between items-end">
 <div>
 <p class="text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase mb-2" style=color:var(--gold-soft)>杭州 → 三亚</p>
 <p class="serif text-3xl italic">¥399 <span class="text-sm not-italic font-sans opacity-60">起</span></p>
 </div>
 <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors group-hover:bg-[var(--gold)]" style=border-color:var(--gold)>
 <svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=24 height=24 viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=2 stroke-linecap=round stroke-linejoin=round data-lucide=arrow-up-right aria-hidden=true class="lucide lucide-arrow-up-right w-4 h-4"><path d="M7 7h10v10"></path><path d="M7 17 17 7"></path></svg>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="reveal group cursor-pointer hover-trigger md:mt-16 visible">
 <div class="overflow-hidden mb-6">
 <img src=data:image/avif;base64, class="w-full h-80 object-cover destination-img" alt="Osaka street">
 </div>
 <div class="flex justify-between items-end">
 <div>
 <p class="text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase mb-2" style=color:var(--gold-soft)>杭州 → 大阪</p>

 </div>

 </div>

 </div>
 <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors group-hover:bg-[var(--gold)]" style=border-color:var(--gold)>

 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </section>

 <section class="py-32 px-8 lg:px-20" style=background:var(--cream)>
 <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
 <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-20 items-center">
 <div class="reveal visible">
 <div class="gold-line mb-8"></div>
 <h2 class="serif text-5xl md:text-6xl mb-8">常旅客计划</h2>
 <p class="text-sm leading-relaxed mb-10 max-w-md" style=color:var(--navy-light)>从银卡到钻石，每一次飞行都是向上的阶梯。积分永不过期，礼遇层层升级。</p>
 <div class=space-y-6>
 <div class="flex items-center gap-6 p-6 border transition-colors hover:bg-white" style=border-color:rgba(201,162,39,.3)>
 <div class="w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-semibold" style=background:rgba(192,192,192,.2);color:var(--navy)>Ag</div>
 <div>

 </div>
 </div>

 <div>
